_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to build a baseline of configuration/state for host machines
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.436), DA-K-011 (DA, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.494). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, baseline, build, configuration, host, machines] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, infrastructure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.870, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ability to build a baseline of configuration/state for host machines" and "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.458 ≈ STS 0.494 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, baseline, build, configuration, host, machines]. WIDAI terms: [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, infrastructure].
